Lebanon Electoral Platform

Lebanese Parliamentary Elections Simulator

Configure district quotas by sect, enter candidate votes, and simulate winners.

This tool simulates Lebanese parliamentary seat allocation by district using list votes, preferential votes, and the district's fixed confessional seat quotas. Select a district, load or enter vote data, then run the simulation to see how seats and winners change.

District & Candidates

Scenario Inputs

District Configuration

Template Seat Map

Choose a district template to check whether a 2022 baseline is available.

Select a district template to continue.

Seat Quotas By Sect

Total seats: 0

Sect Quota

Party / List Sect Name Votes

Simulation Results

Deterministic Output

Simulation results appear after a district template is loaded.

List EQ Allocation

Party / List Votes EQ Status Seats Base Seats

Winning Candidates

Seat Sect Candidate Party / List Votes

District Visual Analytics

Seat Map Summary

List Seat Share

Seats won out of the district total.

Vote Share vs Seat Share

See where seat power runs ahead of vote weight.

Closest Races

The tightest sect contests in the current run.

Seat Gain Thresholds

How close each list is to gaining or risking a seat.

Sect Quota Bars

Stacked quota bars showing which lists currently occupy each sect seat.

List Vote Bars

Raw list votes compared with the actual list color palette.

Seat Pie Chart

3D-style view of seats won by each list.

Competitiveness Lollipops

Gap-to-challenger lines for each sect contest.

List Sect Capture

Visual map of which sect seats each list is currently taking.

Candidate Leaderboard Ribbons

Top candidates by votes, grouped by sect and colored by list.

Seat quotas are loaded from templates and locked in-app to preserve calculation integrity. Validate official seat maps before publishing final outcomes.
